com.mimecast.robin.mime.headers.HeaderWrangler

Package
Description
com.mimecast.robin.mime.headers
Deals with the headers of a MIME message.

  • Uses of HeaderWrangler in com.mimecast.robin.mime.headers

    Methods in com.mimecast.robin.mime.headers that return HeaderWrangler
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HeaderWrangler
    HeaderWrangler.addHeader(MimeHeader header)
    Adds a header to be appended after existing headers.
    HeaderWrangler
    HeaderWrangler.addHeaderTag(HeaderTag headerTag)
    Adds a header tag to be injected.
    HeaderWrangler
    HeaderWrangler.process(InputStream input, OutputStream output)
    Processes the email from input stream and writes the modified email to output stream.
    HeaderWrangler
    HeaderWrangler.removeHeaders(List<String> headerNames)
    Configures headers to be removed during processing.
